title: Disintegrator
description: Disintegrator mod allows you to get ingredients back from items. You can also transfer enchantments from tools & armor to books.
body:
Introducing the Disintegrator mod for Minecraft, a powerful tool that revolutionizes item management and enchantment transfer. With the Disintegrator, you gain the ability to break down items into their craftable parts, providing a new level of resource management and recycling in your Minecraft world. No longer will your inventory be cluttered with unused items. Simply place an item into the Disintegrator and watch as it disintegrates, yielding its constituent materials for future use in crafting.

But that's not all! The Disintegrator goes beyond mere item breakdown. It also offers a unique solution for enchantment preservation. When you have enchanted tools, armor, or weapons that have served their purpose, the Disintegrator allows you to remove those enchantments and transfer them onto books. This way, you can preserve the valuable enchantments and use them later on other items, creating a powerful arsenal of enchanted gear.

With the Disintegrator mod, you have the power to streamline your inventory, reduce waste, and make the most of your enchantments. Unleash your creativity and resourcefulness as you embark on new adventures in the vast Minecraft universe!
